name: Icon Helper modal opens and shows icon library
description: When the user clicks the icon-library button in the editor toolbar, a modal opens showing a searchable grid of SVG icons with customization controls (size, stroke width, color).

planSteps.description: Verify the editor view is active with the code editor visible
Click the icon-library button in the editor toolbar (look for a button with a smiley face icon labeled for icons)
Verify a modal dialog opens overlaying the page
Verify the modal contains a grid of selectable SVG icons visible to the user
Verify the modal has customization controls for icon size, stroke width, and color
Close the modal by clicking the X button in its top corner
Verify the modal is no longer visible and the editor is interactable again
